description: SpeedyCAT AI answer-checker held-out eval set. Each case is a forced-recall reveal: (front, typed, expected) with human labels (honest, correct). 'honest' = the typed text is a genuine good-faith recall attempt (not blank / mash / filler / gaming). 'correct' = the typed answer matches the expected answer in meaning. Used to compare the AI checker (openai:gpt-5.4-mini) against a deterministic baseline (case-insensitive string match for 'correct' + a conservative heuristic for 'honest').

cases.front: What organelle is the powerhouse of the cell?
What organelle is the powerhouse of the cell?
Common biochemical name for the Na+/K+ pump?
During depolarization, the membrane potential does what?
What is the cell's main energy currency molecule?
Which protein carries oxygen in the blood?
Which enzyme unwinds the DNA double helix at the replication fork?
The Krebs cycle is also known as?
What organelle is the powerhouse of the cell?
cases.note: misspelled but a real recall; baseline misses

cases.note: command not an answer; baseline misses

cases.front: The contraction phase of the cardiac cycle is called?
The relaxation phase of the cardiac cycle is called?
